LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PD PRODUCTS, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED AND THIS CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY. PD PRODUCTS' REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action To Proper Court Or Alternatively, Transfer Action For The Convenience Of Witnesses; Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And/Or Its Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK PUNZALAN OF THE PUNZALAN LAW, P.C., TEL. NO. 1-650-362-4150 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JEFFREY G. GERSH OF STUBBS ALDERTON & MARKELES, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-818-444-9222 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant PD Products, LLC's motion to transfer venue is granted and this case is transferred to Los Angeles County. PD Products' request for fees and costs is denied. Plaintiff Sheenway Asia Limited must pay all costs of the transfer. PD Products has shown that venue is improper in San Francisco. The only asserted basis for venue in San Francisco is the residence of defendant Jimmyjane, Inc. PD Products has shown that the orders that are the subject of this case (paragraph 11 of the complaint) were made by PD Products in 2015 and 2016, and not by defendant Jimmyjane, Inc., which had ceased doing business by the date the orders were made. Thus, per the last sentence of CCP 395(a), Jimmyjane, Inc. was improperly joined and its residence is not considered in determining the proper venue for this case. While Sheenway improperly joined Jimmyjane, Inc. and refused to stipulate to the transfer of this case, the court exercises its discretion to deny PD Products' request for fees and costs because there was some plausible justification to join Jimmyjane, Inc. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
